case_title: ROBERT RUBALCABA VS. JAMES WELCH BHASKAR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBALCABA, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BHASKAR, JAMES WELCH DBA WELCH CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
